sign.yourNamePlaceholder: Enter your full name as on ID

sign.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the contract terms

sign.needTerms: Confirm that you accept the terms
sign.successDesc: Your name, role, and signature have been added to the PDF (when the template supports it). You may close this page.
sign.emailNotice: If email is configured on the server, a copy of the signed PDF is sent to the address you entered.
sign.paymentStatusPendingDetail: Click Pay now to continue to the secure payment portal.
sign.alreadySigned: This contract has already been signed
